result: Multifrontal (clique-tree) Cholesky over the hypergraph is EXACT (= dense) at O(d*w^2) storage / O(d*w^3) factorization. kato15 5 seeds x 4 depths: MF R2 == DENSE R2 at every cell; flop speedup 18x->1270x as d 105->889 (grows (d/w)^2); online update touches EXACTLY its path-to-root (log2(N) cliques). Delivers the F-EVO-6 open item (solve-time win).

novelty_classification.note: Multifrontal method is CLASSICAL (Duff-Reid 1983 / junction-tree elimination); NO algorithmic-novelty claim. Framework value = the hypergraph clique tree AS the assembly tree, separator Schur complements AS the messages -- the exact sparse solver the E4 evolvent needed.

components_added_or_updated: InfoEvolventHead note (E5 delivers its solve-time path)
framework_impact.new_module: src/junction_tree.rs (distinct concern: sparse linear-algebra solver, not an online RLS head; online.rs was already 609 LOC -- discovery pass confirmed no existing chol/junction/frontal code)

precision_family_now_complete.block_diagonal: O(d*w) store / O(d*w^2) solve, approximate -- drops separators (E3)
precision_family_now_complete.information_J: O(d*w) store / O(d^3) DENSE solve, exact (E4)
precision_family_now_complete.multifrontal_LLt: O(d*w^2) store / O(d*w^3) solve, EXACT + online-local (E5)

honest_scope: flop win is an ANALYTIC count (not a wall-clock benchmark)
incremental re-fire is proven-local but optimized refactorize_path not built (measure-before-optimize)
requires a valid clique tree (RIP + bounded width); SBSH certificate is the guarantee
BLOCK gap small (~0.0002) is a REGIME property (additive + data-rich per clique), not a method limit -- non-additive/data-scarce discriminating target still open

next_experiment_proposal.name: contiguous-storage rewrite + criterion wall-clock at large d (analytic flops -> measured time); optimized refactorize_path; non-additive/data-scarce cross-clique discriminating target
